summary: Backend: 26/26 pytest passing (auth, groups, files/upload+stream, products CRUD, sell, incidencia, sales/incidents lists, dashboard with day/week/month/year filters, logout). Frontend: end-to-end UI flow verified — register → onboarding (create group, show codigo_union) → dashboard (3 KPIs + 4 filter buttons + recharts bar chart + bottom nav 4 tabs) → inventory (FAB → add product modal → product card with sell button) → sell modal (confirm precio_venta) → ventas list (product shown with margin in green and red Incidencia button). All key data-testids present and functional.

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings briefly during initial mount before container measures. Not blocking, chart renders correctly after data load.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 589 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, groups, products, files, dashboard) for maintainability.
/api/files/{file_id} accepts token via query string (?auth=) which is functional for but exposes the bearer token in browser history/referer logs; consider signed short-lived URLs.
Dashboard endpoint loads all products into memory and iterates per bucket — O(products * buckets). Fine for MVP scale but should be optimized with MongoDB aggregation pipelines as volume grows.
POST /auth/session uses Emergent OAuth session_token directly as our session token, which couples lifecycle; gen_token() fallback is fine.
No rate limiting on /auth/login or /auth/register — add throttling to prevent brute-force / signup spam.
verify_password silently returns False on any bcrypt exception, which would hide configuration issues like malformed hashes in DB.
test_credentials: Existing /app/memory/test_credentials.md has demo1@test.com / password123. Tests generate fresh emails per run (test_a_<uuid>@test.com).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed. Tests create per-run users/groups/products prefixed with TEST_ or random uuid; not cleaned up but isolated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers all endpoints. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. To replay UI flow, register with random email → mode-create → input-business-name → submit-create-group → goto-dashboard → nav-inventario → fab-add → input-product-name+price → submit-product → sell-btn-* → input-sell-price → confirm-sell → nav-ventas. Mobile timing (390x844) can be slower; allow ~3s wait after dashboard nav for KPI testids to appear.
